issues.title: Parameter declarations missing `unit` attributes
issues.detail: Parameters such as m_liquid and cp_liquid specify their units in the string comments but lack the formal `unit` attribute in the declaration. While this does not affect the simulation results, adding the `unit` attribute improves model introspection and enables Modelica tools to perform unit consistency checking.

recommendations: Add `unit` attributes to parameter declarations for better Modelica tooling support, e.g., `parameter Real m_liquid(unit="kg") = 10` and `parameter Real cp_liquid(unit="J/(kg.K)") = 4184`.
模型守恒方程与边界条件完全自洽，能量残差（energy_residual）终值约1.5e-9 J，属于DAE求解器正常数值噪声，验证了能量守恒。无需修改。
